use_cases: Display hierarchical file/folder structures like code editors and file explorers
Navigate nested configuration or settings trees
Show organizational hierarchies or category trees
Browse directory structures in documentation or admin panels
Present nested data in dashboards or admin interfaces
ai_summary: A tree view component for displaying hierarchical data structures using Ark UI. Renders nested nodes with expand/collapse functionality, styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean minimalist look. Supports file/folder visualization with icons and smooth state transitions.
